name: tabby-status
description: System status side panel for Tabby SSH sessions
author: local

scripts.pack:plugin: npm run build && mkdir -p release && npm pack --pack-destination release
scripts.install-local: npm run build && npm pack && npm install --prefix "$HOME/Library/Application Support/tabby/plugins" --omit=dev --legacy-peer-deps "./tabby-status-0.1.0.tgz"
